title: Lead SEO Specialist at Park Avenue Global Group

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Park Avenue Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Park Avenue Global Group! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Bhubaneswar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Park Avenue Global Group:
Park Avenue Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Park Avenue Global Group!
